name: fetch-frequencies registry: an any-frequency source resolves through the registry to its per-source cadence
command: printf 'sources:\n  aws-well-architected: 45s\n' > ff.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/poll-scheduler.sh" --source-id aws-well-architected --fetch-frequency any-frequency --freq-file "$PWD/ff.yaml" --now-ms 0 --last-fetch-ms 0
